titleStmt.title: SII 15.214: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 214. (B.K. No. 6 of 1926-27.) GADAG, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the prākāra wall of the Trikūṭēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1121, Siddhārthi, Prathamāshāḍha śu. 8, Thursday, corresponding to 1199 A.D., June 3.

It registers the renewal of a gift of land made to the god Svayambhu-Trikūṭēśvara for worship and offerings, after washing the feet of Siddhānti-Chandrabhūshaṇa-paṇḍita, by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāyadēvarasa who was governing this territory from Haḷḷavurakuppa. Rāyadēvarasa who is described as Vīra-pradhāna of the king was the son of Bammidēva who belonged to the family of Keñcha, the chief of Beḷvōla Threehundred. The gift was made on the bank of the Tuṅgabhadrā while the donor was engaged in pious deeds.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē
nētrōtpaḷacaṁdra gōtra namaḷacaritraṁgī rāya
dēvavibhugīgoḷpaṁ . tadvaṁśāvatārameṁteṁdaḍe . samastāmarakuḷapūjya
menisi baḷvolanāḍoḷu gōmahiṣīdhanadhānyayutāmarapuraviṁtidene janaṁ so
gayisuguṁ . parigaṇiyipa jana bhavanada tīrtthaṁkaranivāsada śōbhākara
yakṣayakṣiṇīgṛhaparikarada jināgama . jvāḷinīsamagraguṇa
maṇimāḷinīsādhakavinayasubrati janatāpāḷinīduritamaḷaprakṣāḷinī
saṁviveyenippaḷaṁtā puradoḷ . nagaḷdā kaṁcamaneṁba kaḷgeleganaṁtā jvāḷinidēviyalli
ge yārādhisaleṁde baṁdosayisal� ḷgeseṭṭigaṇavilli
niṁnaṁ baligoṁḍenāvagavenniṣṭamanīvudeṁdu karuṇakkānamnanāgirppudu . Illiya
bēḷarggellaṁ balladanāna vananeṁnaya baladiṁ gelvoḍeyanna nīti
nitta dēvaraṁ . Ā barada baladinātmamanōbaladiṁdoṁde meyyoḷaṇ�noḷidirāḷādaḍavage
yanikkidanī balpiṁtārgge salvudene keṁcanṛpa . kuṁdade vā navilaṁkuṁda sthaḷa
vana pasarāgi navilguṁdavesarādudā kuṁḍade pracaṇḍa vaniṁ . tripadi . navila
kki māḍavanēṟe maṁḍalikanēsaranōṁtu beḷvolanāḍellavanāḷdaṁ śauryanidhi keṁca . Intivagidu saṁ
padamaṁ tanagittā jvāḷinīmahādēvige celvenipāvāsamanettisi yanēkavṛttigaḷanittanā kaṁca
rasaṁ . mige keṁcana kuladoḷu balliga haḷḷiga nāgahuliga kōṭiganene pati bammane negaḷḍa
rbbeḷvolada bhūpa baḷiyaṁ . jana baḷekāṭiya yeṇnanā navilguṁdado
ḷoḷpina nidhiyettisidaṁ tribhuvanatiḷakamenippa pasara jinamaṁdiramaṁ . Āta nṛpa
guṇasaṁpaṁnamumāda tadumaśadoḷ Anupamakīrtti . sittaleya vaṁśaśirōmaṇi rāya dēva
nā janapana sūnu beḷvolada maṁneyaragraṇi bammidēvanātana taneya catussamaya dharma samu
ddharaṇaṁ parārtthanūtana śibiyeṁbudī vasudhe satyaguṇāṁbudhi rāyadēvanaṁ . rppatinijajana
kaṁ cāgada nidhi baṁmidēvanātmāṁbikeyuṁ bāgala .
game . kaṭṭi biḍu kēvaḷidīkege koṭṭaḷī kapāca muṭṭuridī hāsyake paṭṭāgada
gaṁḍanale maṁneya rāya . svasti samadhigata paṁcamahāśabdaṁ mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara Āsaṁdi mayū
rapuravarādhīśvara virōdhimaṇḍaḷikanagavajradaṇḍa subhaṭacūḍāmaṇi vairigajakēsari sahajamu
rāri śrīmajjinegaṁdhōdhakapavītrīkṛtōttamāṁganēkāṁgavīra paranārīdūra vibudhajana su tya be
ḷvolāditya jvāḷinīdēvīlabdhavaraprasādāsādita kaligaḷaṁ kāva mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ rāyadēvarasar
beḷōlanāḍoḷagaṇa grāmānugrāmaṁgaḷa śrīvīra
ballāḷadēvana vīrapradhānanāgi haḷḷavurada kuppadoḷu sukhadinirddu śakanṛpakāḷā krāṁta saṁva
tsara śataṁgaḷu 1121 neya siddhārtthi saṁvatsarada prathamāṣāḍha śuklapakṣāṣṭami bṛhaspa
tivāra byatīpāta puṇyadinadoḷā byatīpātanimittaṁ tuṁgabhadrādēvige bhakti snāna
dānaṁgaḷaṁ māḍuttirppaṁduvallirpa tīrtthāśritarappa paurāṇikarā
gisuvu nāgi kēḷuttirppaṁnegaṁ mattalā śrīsvayaṁbhūprasanna trikūṭēśvaradē
vasthānācārya śrīmatsiddhāṁticaṁdrabhūṣaṇapaṁḍitadēvaru dēvakāryyārtthaṁ bīḍi noḷiddu
nijasthānakke bijayaṁ geyvuttuvā dakṣiṇagaṁgeya dakṣiṇatīradoḷirdu rakke
yduvappāgaḷu . beṁbiḍidu barppa vibudhakuḷabaḷadēvaprasādavaṁ baravaṁgaḷtiṁ bēḍi manādēvamaṁ
bagagoṁḍattalosadu nōḍuvāgaḷ . vinutā dēvatva
ḻuttire mattavalli viḷasatsiddhāṁtacihnaṁ purātanasaiddhāṁtikasaccaritramoḍagūḍalu kūḍe lō
kaykapāvanavādaṁ muni caṁdrabhūṣaṇabudhaṁ saiddhāṁtikāgrēsaraṁ . manuvina saccaritra
vinajātana sūnriṁtanaṁbarēcarēśana viḷasatparārtthaguṇavabjajanudghavivēkavabjanābhava dorepetta satva
guṇavi śanudāratva kūḍi kūḍe sanmunipana rūpanāḷduvenaloppidudākṛti satyavākyane .
praṇatābhīṣṭapaḷapradāyiyenipatyaudāryadiṁ caṁdrabhūṣaṇapuṇyāṁbudhiyoḷ
śivāgamasatsiddhāṁtadiṁ caṁdrabhūṣaṇasaiddhāṁtikanoḷ sadāśivasamagrajñānadiṁ caṁdrabhū
ṣaṇayōgīṁdranoḷārssamaṁ tūṇe samānaṁ bhūribhūcakradūḷ . Ā mahānubhāva
ranidirggoṁḍu taṁnadītīradoḷsukhāsanastharāgirddavara pādārccaneyaṁ māḍiyavarmmā ḍida sa
nmānadānadiṁ paritōṣamanaydi svayaṁbhūprasanna trikūṭēśvaradēvara dēvakāryyārttha
vāgi vṛttiparikaḷpaneyaṁ māḷdu saṁkaḷpadinā puṇyadinadoḷmuṁnnavā dēvavarggavaṁ pāramē
śvaradattiyāgi saluttirddahiriya haṁdigoḷadoḷ tamage naḍeva sīvaṭageyyanā tuṁgabhadrā pu
ṇyōdakadinā siddhāṁti caṁdrabhūṣaṇapaṁḍitadēvara pādaprakṣāḷana dhārāpūrvvaka sarvva
bādhāparihāra sarvvanamasyamācaṁdrārkasthāyi śrī svayaṁbhūprasaṁna trikoṭēśvaradē
vōpabhōgyayōgyamāge biṭṭa . sthiravadenal dānaṁ hiriya haṁdigoḷaṁ janasēbya valli tanna
rasutanakke sīvaṭamanal sale salvaṟuvetta mattaruvve reyanudāri rāya
rasanā trikōṭēśvara dēvakāryyakādaradoḷe biṭṭanantadane pāḷike beḷvalanāḍa manne yar . ©
priyadiṁdiṁtidaneyde kāva puruṣaṁgāyuṁ mahāśrīyuvakke yidaṁ kāyade pāpige kurukṣē
trōrvviyoḷvāraṇāsiyoḷaḷkōṭimunīṁdraraṁ kavileyaṁ vēdāḍhyaraṁ koṁdudūṁda yaśaṁ sārgumideṁdu sā
ṟidapudī śailākṣaraṁ dhātriyoḷu .
Digital edition of SII 15.214 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
